reviews.review_description: don't download don't waste your money, useless game never got to play. game lags and doesn't work properly

When will the next update come? Is there any way you can add hellhounds demons? Big giant monsters that scary like the formity. Awesome props traps stuff. Like kind of like green smoke in the atmosphere where shows that is polluted. Any Garnett's bombs? Are you gonna make a way show as monsters? Crawl out the ground from a cemetery kind of Theme How do I like a foggy mist? Monsters were different type of blood like blue-green. Kind of demon that they have on doom some real scary. That's the form some real giant where you can hear a stop and pick and stop in noise where you hear it coming. Cause it's real giant and big dobby real scary. Like if you look down a hallway, you see a big giant deformed monster just coming at you that make you so terrified, you start running. Some big scary bosses. Oh, like a demon comes at you spitting acid. Monsters were tentacles and stuff coming out. Their Head when you start shooting at it, the tentacles bust out the head and start moving it where trying to get you. Are you chopped off or shoot one of the arms off tentacles come out? They arms and stretch out trying to get you make it more terrifying. Gary atmosphere music that makes it more. Have you off the edge? I have, like deformed creatures sticking on the walls trying to get you. Like about what to look up on the cylinder and see a Monster Falling from the cylinder. And trying to get me. Or if you shoot a zombie deal with spload and maggots and stuff becoming out their bodies. Are they guts be hanging out? Are some monsters with guts and stuff hanging all out And thank you, and keep up the good work. You make a amazing game. And please let me know when you have an update. I am so excited to wait for it to come. It's gonna be amazing, I love this game. Play it all the timy family, be scared Or can you add like something like a cabinet or our house or something? You can hide Or aside a locker where you can hide from a zombie. Or if you hide behind something, they can't see you until you reveal yourself. Or if I'm ducking behind something? Does zombie's won't try to get me

developer_response.body:
Hi midnight, thanks for your support and suggestions. An update will be released soon that improves room mapping and melee combat.
As for the other things you suggested, I will try to introduce them in the next few months. If you give me your email I can contact you and ask you for other suggestions to improve the game. Thank you

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed playing this game and liked the zombie effects and gunplay. The setup took me some time to figure out, but overall great experience! Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body:
Thanks Jo78970, 
Your compliments are greatly appreciated, I will be releasing updates with new weapons soon.
Regards

reviews.review_description: I want to like this game, it looks like a blast and I love the concept. I set up my area. Walls, doors, light source, spawn points, base. Then save and enemy spawn never gets a green light. I'm following the tutorials but still must be missing something. I will update my review once I can actually play the game. I've tried on 3 different sessions to set up my play area. With no success. I belive this game would benefit from a more in depth tutorial.

developer_response.body:
Hi MrWhite, 
I am sorry for the problems you are having and I realize that it is quite difficult at first. I am preparing a tutorial in English and more effective, just have a little patience. If I can help you in the meantime, ask me. Greetings

0723 -> Try this tutorial: https://youtu.be/SAvudPxjTDs

reviews.review_description:
Not too easy to configure it at the beginning. After that very funny and realistic game. Zombies are very realistic. I liked dark mode , at the end I can say it is my favourite horror game !!!!
Good job bro !!!!
Can't get it set up week now waste of money and no help on line

developer_response.body:
Hi shattered, 
I'm sorry about the problems you're having, have you seen the online tutorials? Try watching this video.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SAvudPxjTDs&t=42s

if you need contact me at gabrielepunzo@hotmail.com
